subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of Bahá! The eloquent and perspicuous verses were read, and they possessed the utmost sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء اشعار فصیح و بلیغ قرائت گردید و در نهایت حلاوت بود تا توانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for women, @transcendence; unknowability of God
